name: Blueberry Boy Bait
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, sugar, and butter. Reserve 3/4 cup of this mixture for topping.
2. To the remainder, add salt, baking powder, milk, and egg yolks. Blend well.
3. Beat egg whites until firm; fold into batter.
4. Pour batter into a 9-inch X 11-inch baking pan.
5. Sprinkle blueberries over top, then the reserved flour/sugar/butter mixture.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40-50 minutes.
